old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-7by6","title":"[spec-compliance] SenML location uses wrong unit string vs spec","description":"spec/appendix-senml.md:33-45 specifies u:\"lat\" for latitude record and u:\"lon\" for longitude (per RFC 8428 unit registry for geographic coordinates). However, lichen/subsys/lichen/senml/senml.c:335-340 hardcodes \"deg\" in senml_add_float(..., \"deg\", ...) for both. senml.h:57-62 defines SENML_LOCATION_LAT=\"lat\", SENML_LOCATION_LON=\"lon\", SENML_LOCATION_UNIT_DEG=\"deg\" but these are not used in encode_location(). coap_location.c:60 calls it. This is a code/spec mismatch on constants. Last touched in project-LICHEN-rgpx:fix (7740e390f) and related bridge-zephyr board configs. MUST align implementation with published spec example and test vectors.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:27:48.030452803Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:27:48.030452803Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-7by6","title":"[spec-compliance] SenML location uses wrong unit string vs spec","description":"spec/appendix-senml.md:33-45 specifies u:\"lat\" for latitude record and u:\"lon\" for longitude (per RFC 8428 unit registry for geographic coordinates). However, lichen/subsys/lichen/senml/senml.c:335-340 hardcodes \"deg\" in senml_add_float(..., \"deg\", ...) for both. senml.h:57-62 defines SENML_LOCATION_LAT=\"lat\", SENML_LOCATION_LON=\"lon\", SENML_LOCATION_UNIT_DEG=\"deg\" but these are not used in encode_location(). coap_location.c:60 calls it. This is a code/spec mismatch on constants. Last touched in project-LICHEN-rgpx:fix (7740e390f) and related bridge-zephyr board configs. MUST align implementation with published spec example and test vectors.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:27:48.030452803Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:38:44.972751164Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T02:38:44.972751164Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T02:43:44.972751164Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T02:38:44.972751164Z"}
